title: selago elsiae
intro: Selago elsiae, also known as Cape gentian or blue king, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selago elsiae include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Selago elsiae can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
